name: Pseftokeftedes Santorini
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped plum tomatoes, scallions, garlic, parsley, oregano, cinnamon, and mint.
2. Add salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
3. Gradually add the flour and baking powder, mixing until all ingredients are well combined and have a thick batter consistency similar to pancake batter.
4. Heat enough olive oil in a large heavy skillet for frying.
5. Using a heaping tablespoon, drop spoonfuls of the batter into the hot oil.
6. Fry until golden brown and crispy, turning occasionally to ensure even cooking.
7. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
8. Serve hot.
Yield: about 3 dozen
